controversies.title: 2002 Gujarat Riots
controversies.description: Accused of complicity in the 2002 Gujarat communal riots that killed 1,000+. Supreme Court gave him clean chit in 2022.

controversies.title: Electoral Bond Scheme
controversies.description: Introduced Electoral Bond scheme declared unconstitutional by Supreme Court in 2024 for lack of transparency.

controversies.title: Demonetisation
controversies.description: Unilateral demonetisation of ₹500 and ₹1000 notes caused massive economic disruption, 100+ deaths, long queues.

controversies.title: MGNREGS Budget Cuts
controversies.description: Reduced MGNREGS (rural employment) budget by ₹25,000 crore amid high unemployment.

controversies.title: Rafale Deal Allegations
controversies.description: Alleged wrongdoing in Rafale fighter jet procurement. SC gave clean chit to government. Gandhi's comments in SC drawn as contempt.

controversies.title: Criminal Defamation - Modi Surname
controversies.description: Convicted by Surat court for criminal defamation for 'Modi surname thieves' remark. Disqualified as MP for 2 months.

controversies.title: Bharat Jodo Yatra Political Drama
controversies.description: Critics called Bharat Jodo march political stunt amid party organisational weaknesses.

controversies.title: Delhi Excise Policy Scam
controversies.description: CBI and ED alleged ₹100 crore scam in new excise policy. Kejriwal arrested March 2024, granted bail by SC.

controversies.title: Sheesh Mahal Controversy
controversies.description: BJP alleged ₹33 crore spent on CM's official bungalow renovation (called 'Sheesh Mahal'). CAG report flagged irregularities.

controversies.title: Promise vs Reality: Free Electricity
controversies.description: Free electricity beyond 200 units subsidised but Delhi power tariff among highest in India. Subsidy burden rose ₹3,200 crore.

controversies.title: Sandeshkhali Violence Against Women
controversies.description: TMC leaders accused of land grab and sexual violence against women in Sandeshkhali. CBI/ED investigation ordered by HC.

controversies.title: RG Kar Hospital Rape-Murder
controversies.description: Trainee doctor raped and murdered in RG Kar Medical College. State police accused of evidence tampering. CBI took over investigation.

controversies.title: Rose Valley Chit Fund Scam
controversies.description: TMC leaders accused of connections with ₹17,000 crore Rose Valley Ponzi scheme. ED investigations ongoing.

controversies.title: TMC Syndicate Corruption
controversies.description: TMC party workers accused of running 'syndicate raj' — extorting money from construction projects, businesses across Bengal.

controversies.title: Sohrabuddin Fake Encounter Case
controversies.description: Accused of role in fake encounter of gangster Sohrabuddin Sheikh and wife. Discharged by special CBI court in 2014.

controversies.title: Illegal Surveillance Allegations
controversies.description: Phone tapping controversy — alleged illegal surveillance of woman at Modi's behest when he was Gujarat CM. Revealed by The Caravan.

controversies.title: Electoral Bond Architect
controversies.description: As key strategist, co-designed Electoral Bond scheme declared unconstitutional by Supreme Court in 2024.

name: Akhilesh Yadav
position: MP Kannauj, Former CM Uttar Pradesh
education: BE Environmental Engineering, Mysore; MS, Univ. of Sydney, Australia

controversies.title: Goonda Tax / Extortion Allegations
controversies.description: SP government's tenure marked by goonda tax allegations, anti-romeo squad excesses, power sector corruption.

controversies.title: Mining Mafia Connection
controversies.description: UP mining mafia flourished during SP rule. CBI investigations linked SP-era officials to illegal sand mining worth billions.

name: Mayawati
position: BSP National President, Former CM UP (4 times)
education: BA Arts, Kalindi College, Delhi University; LLB

controversies.title: Disproportionate Assets Case
controversies.description: SC/IT raids revealed assets disproportionate to known income. BSP worker donations of crores raised eyebrows.

controversies.title: Taj Corridor Scam
controversies.description: Accused of corruption in Taj Heritage Corridor project. CBI filed FIR but SP Govt later dropped charges.

controversies.title: BSP Fund Misappropriation
controversies.description: IT Dept found discrepancies in BSP fund collection and Mayawati's personal accounts.

controversies.title: Multiple Party Switches
controversies.description: Nitish Kumar switched alliances 7+ times — NDA to Mahagathbandhan to NDA — earning label 'Paltoo Ram' (turncoat) from opponents.

controversies.title: Liquor Ban Failure
controversies.description: Total liquor ban in Bihar led to 73 deaths from hooch tragedy in 2021-22. Bootlegging flourished with alleged police connivance.

controversies.title: Communal Violence Speeches
controversies.description: Multiple FIRs for hate speech and incitement. Arrested in 2007 for inciting communal violence in Gorakhpur.

controversies.title: Encounter Raj — 200+ Encounter Killings
controversies.description: UP Police conducted 10,000+ encounters, 200+ killed since 2017. Human rights groups raised concerns about extrajudicial killings.

controversies.title: Covid Management Failures
controversies.description: Bodies floating in Ganges, mass burial grounds exposed massive under-reporting of Covid deaths in UP.

name: Lalu Prasad Yadav
position: RJD Chief, Former CM Bihar, Former Railway Minister

controversies.title: Fodder Scam — Convicted
controversies.description: Bihar fodder scam — ₹950 crore embezzled from Animal Husbandry dept. Convicted in 4 cases. Served jail time. 5-year election ban.

controversies.title: Land-For-Job Scam
controversies.description: As Railway Minister, CBI alleges he gave railway jobs in exchange for land transfers to family members.

controversies.title: Jungle Raj in Bihar
controversies.description: Bihar under Lalu's CM tenure (1990-97) saw near-collapse of law and order, known as 'Jungle Raj'. Kidnapping industries flourished.

name: Smriti Irani
position: Former Union Minister, Former MP Amethi
education: BA Part-1 (not completed), Delhi University; disputed degree controversy

controversies.title: Educational Qualification Controversy
controversies.description: Stated she had BA degree from Delhi University in 2004 affidavit, then BA Part 1 in 2014. Made HRD Minister despite disputed credentials.

controversies.title: Goa Bar Controversy
controversies.description: Her daughter allegedly ran a bar in Goa at underage. Family denied allegations; controversy sparked political storm.

controversies.title: FTII Controversy
controversies.description: As I&B Minister, appointed Gajendra Chauhan (TV actor) as FTII chair causing student protests and national debate.

name: Sharad Pawar
education: BA, Brihan Maharashtra College of Commerce

controversies.title: Maharashtra Co-operative Bank Scam
controversies.description: ED summoned Pawar over alleged irregularities in Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank worth ₹25,000 crore.

controversies.title: IPL Corruption Allegations
controversies.description: As BCCI president, faced calls to resign over IPL spot-fixing scandal and alleged conflict of interest.
